subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath guided us unto His straight path, enabled us to voice His oneness and His attributes, and strengthened us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدانا الی صراطه المستقیم و انطقنا بتوحید ذاته و صفاته و ایدنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @oneness; unity of religion, @praise and encouragement
